education.degreeLine: 主修：英语（语言学）｜辅修：经济学｜GPA：3.8 / 4.3
highlights: 数理与统计：随机过程、回归分析、计量经济学、信用风险计量、概率统计、线性代数、微积分 I & II、商务统计学等
计算机与建模：机器学习、深度学习、大语言模型、算法原理、数据结构、C++、Python、MATLAB、区块链与数字货币等
经济与金融：公司金融、证券投资分析、中级微观/宏观经济学、货币金融学、会计学、经济学原理等

bullets: 搭建 Python/SQL ETL，处理内外盘 Level-1 OHLCV 期货高频数据，设计自动化异常检测规则，为研究提供稳定输入。
清洗整理 5000+ 只 A 股技术面与基本面数据，解决跨数据源时点对齐，降低中证 500/1000 等指数增强与多因子回测的前瞻性偏差。
构建 Fama-French 类因子数据集，预处理金融新闻文本，支持因子研究与基于大语言模型的情感分析。

独立完成低空经济、军工 AI、军用电子元器件等子行业研究与路演材料。

projects.title: 股吧评论情感分析与情绪因子验证
projects.description: 以 Paddle Senta 为基线，自建标注数据集；融合词典与双向 LSTM 微调，准确率由约 66% 提升至约 86%；构建日度情绪指数并结合 AkShare 验证与市场波动的关联。

en.aboutBody: Undergraduate at Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Major: English (Linguistics); Minor: Economics (GPA 3.8/4.3). Focus on quantitative research, Level-1 intraday data, factor construction & backtesting, and ML for financial text and signals.
en.statusText: Sino-Canada Investment Group · Quant Researcher (Oct 2025 — Present)

skillCategories.items: PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Polars, Databento, NautilusTrader, Hikyuu, Backtrader, Pandas, NumPy

en.bentoNoteBody: Trading, gym & fitness, billiards, ping-pong, go-karting.

highlights: Mathematics & Statistics: Stochastic Processes, Financial Mathematics, Regression Analysis, Econometrics, Probability & Statistics, Linear Algebra, Calculus I & II, Business Statistics
Computer Science & Modeling: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Large Language Model, Algorithms, Data Structures, MATLAB Programming & Modeling, C++, Python, Blockchain & Digital Currency
Finance & Economics: Corporate Finance, Securities Analysis, Intermediate Microeconomics, Intermediate Macroeconomics, Money and Finance, Accounting, Principles of Economics

bullets: Intraday Data Infrastructure: Built Python/SQL ETL pipelines for Level-1 OHLCV futures data; automated anomaly detection for RL and volatility models.
Equity Alpha Support: Fundamental data for 5,000+ A-share stocks; strict Point-in-Time alignment to prevent look-ahead bias in CSI 500/1000 index enhancement backtests.
Factor & Alternative Data: Fama-French-style datasets; pre-processed financial news for LLM-based sentiment analysis supporting signal generation.
Quantitative industry research on emerging tech (e.g. Low-Altitude Economy, Military AI) using Wind for data and benchmarking.
Market comparables and fundraising analysis for an A-share private placement; financial verification support for a Hong Kong IPO.
Longitudinal analysis on 10-year A-share M&A data to assess regulatory changes on valuation and structuring.
Financial validation for IPO projects via Choice; reconciled sales and procurement discrepancies.

academicExperiences.title: Mathematical Contest in Modeling
bullets: Led workflow: milestones, progress checks, and task delegation by member strengths.
Data cleaning, mining, and visualization with Python (Matplotlib, NumPy) and Origin.
Predictive model for tennis match progression (supervised KNN); co-authored sections of the final paper in English.
